title: Ballard Fuel Cell Engine Order for Bus Market
text: Ballard Power Systems announced a multi-year supply agreement with Manufacturing Commercial Vehicles (MCV), an Egyptian commercial vehicle manufacturer, for approximately 5 MW of fuel cell engines destined for the bus market. The order includes 50 FCmove-HD+ engines total with an initial order of 35 units. Deliveries are expected between 2025 and 2026 for projects supporting EU markets. Vice President of Europe Sales & Marketing Oben Uluc stated: We are delighted with this order and the continued engagement with MCV. In 2024 we took in 1,600 bus engines orders across 7 OEMs, and this agreement continues the momentum into 2025. The relationship between Ballard and MCV began in 2022 with fuel cell engine integration support, followed by the first engine order in 2023. Ballard currently powers over 1,800 fuel cell buses worldwide, which have collectively logged more than 200 million operational miles with a reported 99% availability rate. This order reflects the growing international demand for hydrogen fuel cell solutions in the bus sector.
